questions.question: What is meant by the term power sharing?
questions.answer: Power sharing means distributing power among different institutions and groups in a society.

questions.question: Which two countries are discussed in the chapter to explain power sharing?
Which linguistic community forms the majority in Belgium?
Which minority community in Belgium was economically stronger?
Which city in Belgium has a special power-sharing arrangement?
Which two main communities live in Sri Lanka?
What policy did Sri Lankan leaders adopt after independence?
questions.answer: Majoritarian policy favoring the Sinhala majority.

questions.question: Which act made Sinhala the only official language in Sri Lanka?
What was the result of ethnic tensions in Sri Lanka?
Between which years was the Belgian constitution amended to solve conflicts?
What is a community government in Belgium responsible for?
What is the prudential reason for power sharing?
questions.answer: It helps reduce conflict and maintain political stability.

questions.question: What is the moral reason for power sharing?
questions.answer: It states that power sharing is the essence of democracy.

questions.question: What does horizontal power sharing refer to?
questions.answer: Power sharing among the legislature, executive and judiciary.

questions.question: What system allows each organ of government to check the others?
What does vertical division of power mean?
questions.answer: Sharing power among different levels of government.

questions.question: Name the three levels of government in India.
What system divides power between central and state governments?
What ensures representation of weaker sections in India?
What type of government is formed by multiple political parties?
Which groups attempt to influence government policies?
Who is considered the source of political power in democracy?
What problem can arise when power is concentrated in one group?
Which European organization has its headquarters in Brussels?
How does power sharing strengthen democracy?
questions.answer: It ensures participation of different groups in governance.
